---
title: "Writing"
comments: false
description: ""
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

<style>
  .substack-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .substack-subtitle {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .substack-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    background-color: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .substack-btn:hover {
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    color: #fff;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .posts-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.25rem;
    margin-top: 0.5rem;
  }
  .post-card {
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, background-color 0.2s;
  }
  .post-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .post-thumbnail {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }
  .post-thumbnail-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(74,144,164,0.3), rgba(127,176,105,0.2));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .post-thumbnail-placeholder svg {
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  .post-body {
    padding: 1rem;
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.4rem;
  }
  .post-date {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .post-title {
    font-size: 0.97rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .loading-msg {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 2rem 0;
  }
  .error-msg {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 1rem 0;
  }
</style>

<div class="substack-header">
  <p class="substack-subtitle">Essays and reflections on research, faith, and identity</p>
  <a href="https://follhim.substack.com" target="_blank" class="substack-btn">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22.539 8.242H1.46V5.406h21.08v2.836zM1.46 10.812V24L12 18.11 22.54 24V10.812H1.46zM22.54 0H1.46v2.836h21.08V0z"/></svg>
    View on Substack
  </a>
</div>

<div id="posts-container">
  <p class="loading-msg">Loading posts...</p>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  // Use a CORS proxy to fetch Substack's RSS feed
  const FEED_URL = 'https://follhim.substack.com/feed';
  const PROXY_URL = 'https://api.allorigins.win/get?url=' + encodeURIComponent(FEED_URL);

  function formatDate(dateStr) {
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
  }

  function extractThumbnail(item) {
    // Try <media:content> first
    const mediaContent = item.querySelector('content');
    if (mediaContent && mediaContent.getAttribute('url')) {
      return mediaContent.getAttribute('url');
    }
    // Try <enclosure>
    const enclosure = item.querySelector('enclosure');
    if (enclosure && enclosure.getAttribute('url')) {
      return enclosure.getAttribute('url');
    }
    // Try first <img> inside <description>
    const desc = item.querySelector('description');
    if (desc) {
      const html = desc.textContent || desc.innerHTML;
      const match = html.match(/<img[^>]+src=["']([^"']+)["']/i);
      if (match) return match[1];
      // Also try CDATA content
      const cdataMatch = html.match(/src=["']([^"']+\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp))["']/i);
      if (cdataMatch) return cdataMatch[1];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function parseAndRender(xmlText) {
    const parser = new DOMParser();
    const doc = parser.parseFromString(xmlText, 'text/xml');
    const items = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('item'));

    const container = document.getElementById('posts-container');

    if (!items.length) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="error-msg">No posts found. <a href="https://follhim.substack.com" target="_blank" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Visit Substack directly →</a></p>';
      return;
    }

    const grid = document.createElement('div');
    grid.className = 'posts-grid';

    items.forEach(function(item) {
      const title = item.querySelector('title') ? item.querySelector('title').textContent : 'Untitled';
      const link = item.querySelector('link') ? item.querySelector('link').textContent : '#';
      const pubDate = item.querySelector('pubDate') ? item.querySelector('pubDate').textContent : '';
      const thumb = extractThumbnail(item);

      const card = document.createElement('a');
      card.href = link.trim();
      card.target = '_blank';
      card.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';
      card.className = 'post-card';

      const imgHtml = thumb
        ? `<img class="post-thumbnail" src="${thumb}" alt="" loading="lazy" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<div class=\\'post-thumbnail-placeholder\\'><svg width=\\'40\\' height=\\'40\\' viewBox=\\'0 0 24 24\\' fill=\\'white\\'><path d=\\'M22.539 8.242H1.46V5.406h21.08v2.836zM1.46 10.812V24L12 18.11 22.54 24V10.812H1.46zM22.54 0H1.46v2.836h21.08V0z\\'/></svg></div>'">`
        : `<div class="post-thumbnail-placeholder"><svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M22.539 8.242H1.46V5.406h21.08v2.836zM1.46 10.812V24L12 18.11 22.54 24V10.812H1.46zM22.54 0H1.46v2.836h21.08V0z"/></svg></div>`;

      card.innerHTML = imgHtml + `
        <div class="post-body">
          <div class="post-date">${pubDate ? formatDate(pubDate) : ''}</div>
          <div class="post-title">${title}</div>
        </div>`;

      grid.appendChild(card);
    });

    container.innerHTML = '';
    container.appendChild(grid);
  }

  // Try direct fetch first (works if Substack allows CORS)
  fetch(FEED_URL)
    .then(function(r) {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Direct fetch failed');
      return r.text();
    })
    .then(parseAndRender)
    .catch(function() {
      // Fall back to allorigins proxy
      fetch(PROXY_URL)
        .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
        .then(function(data) { parseAndRender(data.contents); })
        .catch(function() {
          document.getElementById('posts-container').innerHTML =
            '<p class="error-msg">Could not load posts. <a href="https://follhim.substack.com" target="_blank" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Visit Substack directly →</a></p>';
        });
    });
})();
</script>
